on_screen_text: I also believe it's our responsibility
to deliver a government that's efficient
with every single dollar being put to the best possible use.
That's why two months ago, I asked agencies across city government
to find $1.7 billion in savings, without compromising essential services.
Even just by capping how much we spend on paper, pens and office supplies.
